details.test: Task 1: Open most recently updated blog article from XML sitemap
Task 2: Open top high-priority weekly URLs from XML sitemap
Task 3: Add oldest filtered URL to SEO audit list
Task 4: Mark three URLs for fast indexing (Index ASAP)
Task 5: Open lowest-traffic duplicate for a canonical page
Task 6: Open second page of URL results for largest sitemap file
Task 7: Add /blog URLs with long titles to Title Fix list
Task 8: Open edit form for shallow URL with missing meta description
Task 9: Copy recently updated high-priority URLs to clipboard
